title: Copilot Prompt Activity by User
description: Summarizes Copilot-related activities by user to establish a usage baseline and detect spikes.
query:
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where OfficeWorkload has "Copilot" or Operation has "Copilot"
| summarize Activities=count(), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by UserId, OfficeWorkload, Operation
| order by Activities desc

title: Copilot Activity Outside Business Hours
description: Finds Copilot-related activity outside normal business hours (06:00-20:00) for anomaly hunting.
query:
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where OfficeWorkload has "Copilot" or Operation has "Copilot"
| extend Hour=hourofday(TimeGenerated)
| where Hour < 6 or Hour > 20
| summarize Events=count() by UserId, Operation, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by Events desc

title: Sensitive File Access Preceding Copilot Activity
description: Correlates recent sensitive SharePoint/OneDrive file access with Copilot activity from the same user.
query:
let SensitiveAccess = OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OfficeWorkload in ("SharePoint", "OneDrive")
| where Operation in ("FileAccessed", "FileDownloaded")
| where SourceFileName has_any ("payroll", "invoice", "contract", "confidential", "hr", "finance")
| project AccessTime=TimeGenerated, UserId, SourceFileName, SourceRelativeUrl;
let CopilotEvents = OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OfficeWorkload has "Copilot" or Operation has "Copilot"
| project CopilotTime=TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation;
CopilotEvents
| join kind=inner SensitiveAccess on UserId
| where AccessTime between (CopilotTime - 30m .. CopilotTime + 30m)
| project CopilotTime, AccessTime, UserId, Operation, SourceFileName, SourceRelativeUrl
| order by CopilotTime desc

title: Copilot and Risky Sign-in Correlation
description: Correlates Copilot-related activities with risky sign-ins to prioritize suspicious sessions.
query:
let RiskySignins = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where RiskLevelDuringSignIn !in ("none", "hidden") or RiskState !in ("none", "remediated")
| project SigninTime=TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, RiskLevelDuringSignIn, RiskState;
let CopilotEvents = OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OfficeWorkload has "Copilot" or Operation has "Copilot"
| project CopilotTime=TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName=UserId, OfficeWorkload, Operation;
CopilotEvents
| join kind=inner RiskySignins on UserPrincipalName
| where CopilotTime between (SigninTime .. SigninTime + 2h)
| project CopilotTime, SigninTime, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, RiskLevelDuringSignIn, RiskState, OfficeWorkload, Operation
| order by CopilotTime desc

title: Potential Prompt Exfiltration Keywords
description: Hunts for Copilot-related events where operation details include possible data exfiltration intent keywords.
query:
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where OfficeWorkload has "Copilot" or Operation has "Copilot"
| extend Context=tostring(parse_json(tostring(Parameters))[0].Value)
| where Context has_any ("export", "download", "full list", "all records", "customer data", "salary", "social security", "pii")
| project TimeGenerated, UserId, Operation, OfficeWorkload, ClientIP, Context
| order by TimeGenerated desc

title: Copilot Plugin or Connector Admin Changes
description: Tracks admin operations related to Copilot plugins/connectors and agent configuration changes.
query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where OperationName has_any ("Copilot", "Plugin", "Connector", "Agent")
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedBy=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), TargetResources, Result
| order by TimeGenerated desc

title: Users with New Copilot Usage in Last 7 Days
description: Identifies users who started Copilot usage recently for onboarding and risk review.
query:
let HistoricUsers = OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(60d) .. ago(7d))
| where OfficeWorkload has "Copilot" or Operation has "Copilot"
| distinct UserId;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OfficeWorkload has "Copilot" or Operation has "Copilot"
| summarize RecentEvents=count(), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated) by UserId
| where UserId !in (HistoricUsers)
| order by RecentEvents desc

title: Copilot Activity by Client IP
description: Provides IP visibility for Copilot-related activity to detect unusual source addresses.
query:
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where OfficeWorkload has "Copilot" or Operation has "Copilot"
| summarize Events=count(), Users=dcount(UserId) by ClientIP
| order by Events desc

title: AI Agents Created by External Users
description: Finds AI agents whose creator UPN is outside your tenant domain. Replace `yourorgdomain.com` before running.
query:
AIAgentsInfo
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AIAgentId
| where AgentStatus != "Deleted"
| where CreatorAccountUpn !endswith "@yourorgdomain.com"
| project-reorder AgentCreationTime, AIAgentId, AIAgentName, AgentStatus, CreatorAccountUpn, OwnerAccountUpns, EnvironmentId

title: AI Agents Not Published Within X Days
description: Highlights AI agents that have not been published recently. Adjust `Lookback` to your required threshold.
query:
let Lookback = 30d;
AIAgentsInfo
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AIAgentId
| where AgentStatus != "Deleted"
| where isnull(LastPublishedTime) or LastPublishedTime < ago(Lookback)
| project-reorder AgentCreationTime, LastPublishedTime, AIAgentId, AIAgentName, AgentStatus, CreatorAccountUpn, OwnerAccountUpns, EnvironmentId
| order by LastPublishedTime asc nulls first

title: AI Agents With No Authentication
description: Identifies AI agents that do not require user authentication and may be exposed more broadly than intended.
query:
AIAgentsInfo
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AIAgentId
| where AgentStatus != "Deleted"
| where UserAuthenticationType == "None"
| project-reorder AgentCreationTime, AIAgentId, AIAgentName, AgentStatus, CreatorAccountUpn, OwnerAccountUpns

title: AI Agents With HTTP Requests to Nonstandard Ports
description: Finds AI agents whose HTTP request actions call explicit ports other than 80 or 443.
query:
AIAgentsInfo
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AIAgentId
| where AgentStatus != "Deleted"
| mvexpand Topic = AgentTopicsDetails
| where Topic has "HttpRequestAction"
| extend TopicActions = Topic.beginDialog.actions
| mvexpand action = TopicActions
| where action['$kind'] == "HttpRequestAction"
| extend Url = tostring(action.url.literalValue)
| extend ParsedUrl = parse_url(Url)
| extend Port = tostring(ParsedUrl["Port"])
| where isnotempty(Port) and Port !in ("80", "443")
| project-reorder AgentCreationTime, AIAgentId, AIAgentName, ParsedUrl, Url, Port, AgentStatus, CreatorAccountUpn, OwnerAccountUpns, Topic

title: AI Agents With HTTP Requests to Connector Endpoints
description: Finds AI agents using raw HTTP actions against endpoints that typically have a built-in Power Platform connector.
query:
AIAgentsInfo
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AIAgentId
| where AgentStatus != "Deleted"
| mvexpand Topic = AgentTopicsDetails
| where Topic has "HttpRequestAction"
| extend TopicActions = Topic.beginDialog.actions
| mvexpand action = TopicActions
| where action['$kind'] == "HttpRequestAction"
| extend Url = tostring(action.url.literalValue)
| extend ParsedUrl = parse_url(Url)
| extend Host = tostring(ParsedUrl["Host"])
| where Host has_any ("graph.microsoft.com", "management.azure.com")
| project-reorder AgentCreationTime, AIAgentId, AIAgentName, ParsedUrl, Url, Host, AgentStatus, CreatorAccountUpn, OwnerAccountUpns, Topic

title: AI Agents Sending Email to AI-Controlled Inputs
description: Identifies generative-orchestration agents that can invoke Outlook email actions with inputs supplied entirely by the orchestrator.
query:
AIAgentsInfo
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AIAgentId
| where AgentStatus != "Deleted"
| extend IsGenAIOrchestrator = tostring(todynamic(RawAgentInfo).Bot.Attributes.configuration) has '"GenerativeActionsEnabled": true'
| where IsGenAIOrchestrator
| mvexpand Action = AgentToolsDetails
| extend OperationId = tostring(Action.action.operationId), ActionName = tostring(Action.modelDisplayName)
| where OperationId == "SendEmailV2"
| where isempty(Action.inputs)
| project-reorder AgentCreationTime, AIAgentId, AIAgentName, AgentStatus, CreatorAccountUpn, OwnerAccountUpns, ActionName

title: AI Agents With Hard-Coded Credentials
description: Detects possible clear-text secrets embedded in AI agent topics or tool definitions.
query:
let suspicious_patterns = @"(AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16})|(AIza[0-9A-Za-z_\-]{35})|(xox[baprs]-[0-9a-zA-Z]{10,48})|(ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36,59})|(sk_(live|test)_[A-Za-z0-9]{24})|(SG\.[A-Za-z0-9]{22}\.[A-Za-z0-9]{43})|(\d{8}:[\w\-]{35})|(eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+\.[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+\.[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+)|(Authorization\s*:\s*Basic\s+[A-Za-z0-9=:+]+)|([A-Za-z]+:\/\/[^\/\s]+:[^\/\s]+@[^\/\s]+)";
AIAgentsInfo
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AIAgentId
| where AgentStatus != "Deleted"
| mv-expand tool = AgentToolsDetails
| mv-expand topic = AgentTopicsDetails
| where isnotempty(tool) and isnotempty(topic)
| where tool matches regex suspicious_patterns or topic matches regex suspicious_patterns
| extend SuspiciousMatchTool = tool, SuspiciousMatchTopic = topic
| project-reorder AgentCreationTime, AIAgentId, AIAgentName, AgentStatus, CreatorAccountUpn, OwnerAccountUpns, SuspiciousMatchTool, SuspiciousMatchTopic

title: AI Agents With Configured MCP Tools
description: Lists AI agents that have Model Context Protocol tools configured.
query:
AIAgentsInfo
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by AIAgentId
| where AgentStatus != "Deleted"
| mvexpand Action = AgentToolsDetails
| where Action.action.operationDetails['$kind'] == "ModelContextProtocolMetadata"
| extend MCPName = Action.action.operationDetails["operationId"]
| summarize MCPTools = make_set(MCPName) by AIAgentName, AIAgentId, EnvironmentId, CreatorAccountUpn
